# Prerelease Gate — 2026-06-19

## Summary
- Repo: danieljustus/symaira-tune
- HEAD: 720fdbd2fdcf4fe75bb559416bdeabaede9e7db3
- Last release: none (no git tags, no GitHub releases)
- Proposed target: v0.1.0 (bump: minor — first release, README/roadmap declare v0.1, 0.y.z rules: features → minor)
- Gate: blocked

## Gate checks
| Check | Result | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| CI / tests (HEAD) | PASS | `CI` workflow run 27830577082 success on HEAD; CodeQL dynamic run 27830576538 in_progress (security scan, not the test gate) |
| Version consistency | PASS | 6 mentions checked, 2 corrected (mechanical, in working tree). Source-of-truth `Sources/SymTuneCore/Version.swift:6` already `0.1.0`. |
| README / doc currency | BLOCK | 4 user-facing doc-drift findings (see Findings). `Sources/symtune/main.swift:24-38` CLI usage labels implemented features as v0.2 / "planned v0.2"; `docs/commercial-boundary.md:13` and `docs/hardware-matrix.md:182-184` do the same. `CHANGELOG.md` v0.1.0 entry describes only the scaffold, not the implemented feature set. `README.md:21` "Not distributed yet." becomes wrong at release. |
| Coverage vs threshold | WARN | No hard repo gate (no `fail_under`, no Codecov, no CI coverage step). Effective threshold: warn-only. |
| Assets preview | PASS | `release.yml` (`.github/workflows/release.yml`) declares the expected matrix: `symtune-<version>.dmg` (Developer ID-signed when `DEVELOPER_ID_APPLICATION` is set, notarized when `APPLE_ID` is set) + Homebrew cask published to `danieljustus/homebrew-tap` when `HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN` is set. No assets produced or uploaded by this skill (release assets belong in 07). |
| Security | PASS | 0 open code-scanning alerts, 0 open secret-scanning alerts, 0 open Dependabot alerts. CodeQL dynamic workflow for HEAD is `in_progress` — long-running security scan, not a release gate. Note: `actions/checkout@v6` in `release.yml` is a mutable tag (closed issue #61 was about this; only `softprops/action-gh-release` was pinned to SHA). Not a gate blocker — the issue is closed and current users are unaffected. |

## Findings
- [ ] **[BLOCK][Docs] CLI usage text labels implemented features as v0.2 / "planned v0.2"**
  - **Status quo:** `Sources/symtune/main.swift:24-38` — the `usage` string printed by `symtune help` and the no-arg banner lists already-implemented write commands with `(v0.2)` / `(planned v0.2)` labels: `brightness set`, `extbright set`, `dim set`, `dim reset`, `warmth set`, `warmth reset`, `restore`, `profile save/load/list/delete`. `dim set/reset` and `restore` are not even labeled v0.2 in the surrounding code — they are misclassified outright.
  - **Likely cause:** Stale usage text from the original scaffold; PR #65 synced README/roadmap/architecture but did not touch `main.swift`.
  - **Proposed solution:** Re-label all implemented commands to `v0.1` and add `(Pro: needs helper)` only to `fan set` / `battery-limit set`. Match the README's "Status: v0.1 — core reads + writes" line. Keep `dim set/reset` and `restore` labels consistent with their siblings.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` (open a docs-issue citing these four files) or `/03-gh-go` to implement directly.

- [ ] **[BLOCK][Docs] `docs/commercial-boundary.md` and `docs/hardware-matrix.md` misclassify v0.1 features as v0.2**
  - **Status quo:** `docs/commercial-boundary.md:13` — "extended/EDR brightness, software dim overlay, built-in brightness (v0.2)". `docs/hardware-matrix.md:182-184` — three rows label `display.dim.set`, `display.brightness.extended.set`, `display.brightness.set` as "GUI process (menu-bar app, v0.2)" / "GUI process (v0.2)". Per `docs/architecture.md:61-63` and the roadmap, these work from the CLI today and ship in v0.1.
  - **Likely cause:** Same stale-doc pattern as the CLI usage text — features were implemented after the original docs were written, and PR #65 only updated the three top-level docs (`README`, `roadmap`, `architecture`).
  - **Proposed solution:** Update both files: re-label as v0.1, drop the "menu-bar app" requirement (CLI works today; the menu-bar app is the v0.2 target per `docs/planned/`).
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` (same docs issue as the CLI usage finding) or `/03-gh-go`.

- [ ] **[BLOCK][Docs] `CHANGELOG.md` v0.1.0 entry describes only the original scaffold**
  - **Status quo:** `CHANGELOG.md:9-33` — the `## [0.1.0] — scaffold` entry's "Added" list covers only the original scaffold (CLI, MCP, reads). PRs #20, #35, #48, #49, #63, #65, #66, #67 added built-in display brightness, EDR brightness, dim overlay, warmth, profiles, restore-on-exit, SMC sensor reads, config wiring, security fixes, restore-on-exit signal-handler fix, and various code-quality fixes — none are recorded. The `## [Unreleased]` section at line 7 is empty.
  - **Likely cause:** The CHANGELOG was written at scaffold time and never updated. The v0.1.0 entry was intended to describe the released binary, but content was never grown alongside the implementation.
  - **Proposed solution:** Repurpose the existing `## [Unreleased]` section: fold the post-scaffold changes into `## [0.1.0]`, drop the "— scaffold" subtitle, and structure the entry as Features / Fixes / Security grouped from the merged PRs (`#20`, `#35`, `#48`, `#49`, `#63`, `#64`, `#65`, `#66`, `#67`). This is a content write, not a mechanical edit.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` (changelog work as part of the docs issue) or `/03-gh-go`.

- [ ] **[BLOCK][Docs] `README.md:21` "Not distributed yet." becomes wrong on release**
  - **Status quo:** `README.md:21` — the v0.1 status block ends with "Not distributed yet." `07-gh-release` will cut the first release, so the line must change to describe the install channel (DMG + Homebrew cask) the same way `symaira-terminal` does.
  - **Likely cause:** Pre-release status; PR #65 left the line as-is because there was no release.
  - **Proposed solution:** Update the status block to remove "Not distributed yet." and add the actual install snippet (matching the `release.yml` template: `brew install danieljustus/tap/symtune` and the DMG download). Use the same wording as the generated release notes.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` (part of the same docs issue) or `/03-gh-go`.

## Applied mechanical fixes (default mode)
- `distribution/symtune.rb.template:2` `version "0.2.0"` → `version "0.1.0"` (cask template, ships as part of the release)
- `docs/planned/SymairaTune/Info.plist:20` `<string>0.1.0</string>` → `<string>0.2.0</string>` (planned v0.2 menu-bar app — version field is forward-looking, not the current release)

## Next step
- gate=blocked → resolve the BLOCK findings via their handoff commands, then re-run `/06-gh-prerelease`
- After the four docs fixes land on `main`, the gate will turn `pass` and the same target (v0.1.0) is ready for `/07-gh-release`
